name: Loi Nguyen
background: Dr. Nguyen has served as our Executive Vice President, Optical and Copper Connectivity Group since April 2021. He co-founded Inphi Corporation and served as its Senior Vice President, Optical Interconnect from 2000 until its acquisition by Marvell in 2021.

company_affiliations.name: Marvell Technology, Inc.
